records.question: Which characteristic types have characteristics where the data type is exactly mollitia?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_characteristic_types.characteristic_type_code FROM ref_characteristic_types
JOIN characteristics ON ref_characteristic_types.characteristic_type_code = characteristics.characteristic_type_code
WHERE characteristics.characteristic_data_type = 'mollitia'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.characteristic_type_code
FROM Ref_Characteristic_Types AS T1
INNER JOIN Characteristics AS T2 ON T1.characteristic_type_code = T2.characteristic_type_code
WHERE T2.characteristic_data_type = 'mollitia'
